message:
feat(freeze): add cached atoms for fast property access

Phase 5 Shape Specialization:
- Add CachedAtoms struct with 15 hot TSC properties
- Add native getters using pre-computed atoms (skip string hashing)
- Extend get_field/get_field2 to use cached atom getters
- Properties: symbol, escapedName, declarations, valueDeclaration,
  members, properties, target, constraint, modifiers, name, text,
  type, checker, typeArguments, arguments

Performance: ~10 cycles saved per property access by skipping
string hashing in JS_NewAtom.
